lightsail.instance.disk.AttachedTo.Description: The resources to which the disk is attached.

lightsail.instance.disk.AttachmentState.Description: (Deprecated) The attachment state of the disk.  In releases prior to November 14, 2017, this parameter returned `attached` for system disks in the API response. It is now deprecated, but still included in the response. Use `isAttached` instead.

lightsail.instance.disk.DiskName.Description: The unique name of the disk.

lightsail.instance.disk.IOPS.Description: The input/output operations per second (IOPS) of the disk.

lightsail.instance.disk.IsSystemDisk.Description: A Boolean value indicating whether this disk is a system disk (has an operating system loaded on it).

lightsail.instance.disk.SizeInGb.Description: The size of the disk in GB.
